---
title: "PAAR*: GREEN"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

MISSION <br>
**G**REENLAND **R**ESEARCHERS **E**SCAPE WHILST YOU **E**SCORT **N**OGGIN 

**MISSION LOCATION** <br> 
█████████████████████████████, GREENLAND, BIWAYS

**MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED** <br> 
1652, 19TH DEC 1989 - 0452, 20TH DEC 1989

**CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE** <br> 
UNIVERSITY OF CAMBRIDGE- 18TH DEC 1989

**REMARKS** <br> 
The last mission of the decade.
The 90s is fast approaching with a hurley covered in obsidian shards to be rid of the 80s.
I was hoping the new decade would be more stable and less weird.
No I'm just aiming for PUML to be a force of good in this world.

A simple but tough job this one.
We were to transport an object called the HEAD* from a top secret research station in Greenland to Nuuk, the capital city.
They had been attacked multiple times and so were ordered evacuate.
The Greenland military tried to deal with it but constant blizzards around the base prevented any large scale deployment.
The researchers were to be airlifted whilst our team would transport the HEAD by ground during a break in the winter blizzards.

The following after action report was created from the debriefs of the surviving members of the team.
It may seem preposterous, and if it was just from CRACKED BATFISH's recount I'd agree, but the whole teams' debriefs match.
Get ready.

The snow was smooth all the way to the research base where the shenanigans started.
Each of my team was given a HEAD and told they had the real one in secret.
Thankfully they did tell TRUFFLE that he actually had the real one and the others had been lied to.
As the mission leader he played along seeing the logic and not wanting the demoralise the team.
The HEAD was far more valuable than Cambridge told me, I could have charged them more.
With their snowmobiles the team set off to Nuuk as the researchers evacuated in a few chinooks.

With a massive crack ringing through the air as the research base self destructed they headed to Nuuk.
Only after an hour or so of traversing the snow and ice encrusted ground the blizzard once again arrived, like an unwanted grenade landing in your dugout.
Though difficult TRUFFLE was able to sense the scent of fur, sweat, and steel. 
Normally it would be impossible for an enemy force to track anyone through the blizzard but they also had sharp noses.
They were fecking Cyborg Polar Bears!
Not only that but they had side mounted heavy machine guns and riders.
These riders were also cyborgs, their head gear attached to the cybertonics of the bears, and they were equipped with stun sticks and Boyes anti-tank rifles.

The team attempted to outrun the two Cyborg Polar Bears but they were faster than snowmobiles seemingly.
With gunfire range fast approaching upon them SUBSONIC did something smart in theory but dumb in reality.
Believing he had the real HEAD he used his Kinetic transfer ability to increase the speed of his snowmobile and race far ahead.
He was too fast for both of TRUFFLE's warnings.
First, he didn't have the real HEAD.
Second, two more CYBORG POLAR BEARS lay in wait ahead.

At greater than 200mph SUBSONIC crashed into one of the hidden CYBORG POLAR BEARS.
The impact killed the bear and caused SUBSONIC and the bear rider to fly of their vehicles*.
This changed it all from being a chase to a good old fashioned mounted combat.
As the other previously hidden Cyborg rose up TRUFFLE lined up the sights of his Ishapore with the mounted riders helmet.
A few shots and he was down.
The loss of its rider transformed the Polar bear from a composed steed into a wild animal.
It bore down on SUBSONIC and the unmounted cyborg rider.
Panicking, the once-rider seized his boyes rifle.
He shot, missed, and yelled in pain as the recoil broke his shoulder.
His scream turned into a crunch and then into silence as the bear started his meal with neck of cyborg.
TRUFFLE ploughed through the snow as fast as he could.
Unfortunately the normal speed of a snowmobile is slower than the hunger of an unleashed bear.

All this whilst the other two, BATFISH and FLASHBANG, attempted to deal with the initial 2 Cyborg polar bears.
Trying to distract them to give TRUFFLE the space to save SUBSONIC the tried to suppress and evade.
Less than useful this allowed the bears to get into firing range.
HMGs fire hit FLASHBANG's backmounted shield like like hail on a corrugated roof.
Thankfully, the riders didn't use their rifles.
Seemingly they have to solely concentrate on controlling their mounts.
Knowing they couldn't outrun the bears they decided to harrass them whilst circling around them.
They were successful in wasting the bear's HMG ammo.
On the other hand BATFISH's and FLASHBANG's firearms were next to useless against the heavily armoured bear and riders.
A gridlock of bears and snowmobiles.

FLASHBANG dazzled one with a stun grenade.
The always insane BATFISH jumped onto one of the bear's back.
Yanking the Boyes rifle off the rider's back he shot through through him and the head of the bear*.
With the force of the gun and the bear's death toss BATFISH flew off its back landing in a soft pile of snow.
Of course there was the other active cyborg bear who wasn't going to waste the opportunity to kill a mad wizard.
FLASHBANG to the rescue.
He just about reached BATFISH first and pulled him on to his snowmobile with his right hand.
With his left arm he blocked a ferocious bite of the bear.
If it had been a normal arm the bear would have pulled him straight off his vehicle.
Instead the arm shattered.
With mouth full of blood and crushed hematite the bear roared and FLASHBANG fled towards TRUFFLE.




on an intercept course
Although a blizzard reduces the range of TRUFFLE's Smell-nar it was still better than the other's visibility






Our mission 



**MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS** <br>
████████████████████ - SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - SUBSONIC HYDRA - KIA <br>
████████████████████ - FLASHBANG FIDDLER - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - CRACKED BATFISH - ACTIVE <br>

\*PAAR is the acronym for PUML After Action Report <br> 
\*Highly Expensive Ambulatory Device<br>
\*Do Cyborg Polar Bears counts as vehicles or mounts?
\*Pretty awesome I must admit

Other mission:
NOt sure if I should include the below as a mission I do think it would be good though

Pickup is in redacted research station, need to reach capital of Nuuk for handoff. 

SUBSONIC HYDRA (power to make anything they touch go extremely fast) crashes into a polar bear (their breaks didn't work because of BATFISH). HYDRA had the head though so they need to fight to get it back.

Following this an impromptu mission involving transporting a frozen head from Greenland to Cambridge. The team were assaulted by cyborg bears. Wolf crashed their snowmobile into one, but the team soon learnt to kill the riders instead. With the riders gone Truffle led the bears to elks, distracting one and Cracks used their wizardry to pacify the other. With little fanfare they made their delivery.

With a successful mission they watched what remained of the LAS-USA burn up on renentry with the background of an aurora.
